scenarios.situation: The user asks for a project but the outcome, scope, or acceptance evidence is unclear.
scenarios.expected_path: grilling, then a user-owned Intent Contract

scenarios.situation: The request, project instructions, and durable product documents disagree.
scenarios.expected_path: grilling plus source-authority resolution; stop if authority cannot resolve it

scenarios.situation: The repository or the relevant entry points are unfamiliar.
The effort spans many workstreams or cannot fit one context window.
scenarios.expected_path: VibeTether milestone/checkpoint fallback; wayfinder remains a catalog-only explicit alternative

scenarios.situation: A bounded runnable experiment is the cheapest way to resolve design uncertainty.
scenarios.expected_path: prototype with a discard boundary and learning verdict

scenarios.situation: One approved implementation slice adds new behavior.
scenarios.expected_path: VibeTether primary execution path with karpathy-guidelines as a policy overlay

scenarios.situation: Behavior is unexpected and the root cause is not known.
A user-visible UI needs a visual direction or golden reference.
scenarios.expected_path: built-in UI Intent Contract, or frontend-design in extended; require visual approval

scenarios.situation: An approved slice changes React, Next.js, React Native, or Vercel behavior.
scenarios.expected_path: the highest-priority matching Vercel specialist from the Web bundle

scenarios.situation: Context was compacted, the session resumed, or responsibility changed agents.
scenarios.expected_path: VibeTether full re-anchor; upstream handoff commands remain catalog-only alternatives

scenarios.situation: Several loosely reported issues need reproduction and priority.
scenarios.expected_path: VibeTether evidence-first triage; upstream triage and qa remain catalog-only alternatives

scenarios.situation: Structural friction suggests an architecture change.
scenarios.expected_path: built-in evidence-led architecture review and user confirmation before structural change

scenarios.situation: A data, contract, or API migration is proposed.
scenarios.expected_path: deprecation-and-migration plus the mandatory destructive-data confirmation gate

scenarios.situation: A reusable user-level or engineering-level workflow succeeds for the first verified time in the current project or environment.
scenarios.expected_path: VibeTether captures a sanitized durable Proven Path immediately, records its checkpoint disposition, and does not wait for a future failure

scenarios.situation: The agent is about to claim the requested work is complete.
scenarios.expected_path: verification-before-completion with fresh evidence and known limitations

scenarios.situation: A new or greenfield directory has no confirmed project direction yet.
scenarios.expected_path: grilling establishes a user-owned Intent Contract before implementation

scenarios.situation: A repeatable operational action has a matching verified publication or environment path.
scenarios.expected_path: vibetether-built-in-recall returns applicable sanitized artifacts before the operational path is reused
